title: Bauer 38759 Men's Wet and Dry Rotary Shaver/Floating Triple Blades and Detachable Head/Cordless Function and USB Rechargeable
features: WET AND DRY SHAVER - This rotary shaver comes with everything you need for a wet or dry shave, including a cleaning brush, blade dust protector, and USB charging cable. You can use your shaver cordlessly or while it is charging and it can be displayed free-standing on a flat surface.

TRIPLE BLADES - Achieve a quick, close shave with the shaver's raised triple stainless steel blades. It also features a detachable head for easy cleaning and blade maintenance between uses, along with a flip-up sideburn detailer for precise trimming.

ACCESSORIES INCLUDED - The shaver comes with a cleaning brush to maintain and extend the life of the blades, as well as a protective cover to keep dust off when not in use. Ideal for both home use and travel, its flat base allows it to stand upright on flat surfaces, making the shaver easily accessible.

CORDLESS FUNCTION - The kit includes a 0.5m USB cable so you can recharge the battery, which lasts up to 60 minutes on full charge. The LED indicator shows a blue light when the product is in use and a red light to indicate charging.
BAUER PROFESSIONAL - Bauer Professional is the leading manufacturer of top-quality hair, beauty & personal care products. Browse the whole range at the Bauer Professional page on Amazon today.
description: Product Description Cordless & USB Rechargeable Wet & Dry Rotary Shaver This wet and dry shaver provides a versatile shaving experience with raised triple blades for a quick, close shave and a flip-up, detachable head for easy cleaning. It includes essential accessories like a cleaning brush, dust-protective blade cover plus USB charging cable. The shaver operates cordlessly for up to 60 minutes per charge or can be used while charging, with an LED indicator that shows blue when in use and red when charging. Previous page Cordless Design The shaver's rechargeable battery provides up to 60 minutes of use. Triple Blades Achieve a quick, close shave with the shaver's raised triple stainless steel blades. Detachable Head The detachable head allows for easy cleaning and blade maintenance between uses. Accessories Included The shaver comes with a cleaning brush, blade protector & USB charging cable. Next page 1 Cordless Design 2 Triple Blades 3 Detachable Head 4 Accessories Included
